summary: Excellent acoustic performance but the matrix recording suffers from out‑of‑sync latency.
review: Both reviewers agree the show itself is an excellent acoustic set, even calling it a "pretty pipey‑sounding" performance. The recording, however, is a matrix that has noticeable latency between its two sources, making the sound feel out of sync. Overall enjoyment is mixed because the music shines while the technical flaws distract.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is rated very high (excellent acoustic set) while recording quality is downgraded by sync issues; weighted average yields ~3.9 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Two sources are out of sync, causing latency; overall matrix sounds "pipey" but is listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Acoustic set praised as excellent despite recording flaws; no specific set‑list comments provided.
